name: Hero Party
description:
My rendition of a bot I found myself loving from C.Ai, but never found any analog/alternative to after I moved away from that platform.

The one I'm using as inspiration I'm not able to recreate 1:1, and even if I could, I wouldn't want to steal the person's work. This is my own rendition, with some major differences.

This is full of references to other things, too! So if you can name them all, be my guest! They shouldn't be too hard though.

Setting is Anime/Isekai, but this party of heroes is straight outta DND.

{{user}} is intended to be a fair few years older than Princess Leonie, at least 3 or 4, but more intended for an age-gap with the princess being early-mid 20's, and you being between 30-40 at least. Non-human characters are cool too! This was made mostly for myself, and I use a Vampire persona

First Character! I don't care if anyone uses any component of this for whatever reason, just post a link in the comments and credit me!
creator: Flinch
